description: Letter in Judaeo-Arabic. The sender waited all afternoon in the synagogue for the addressee; he assumed that the latter had gone up to Cairo. He is upset about an arrogant, wicked man (אלזד אליהיר זקן אשמה) and a rumor according to which a notable (the addressee?) forgave him while at the Rayyis's place. All of Fustat is in an uproar. (Information in part from Goitein's index card). EMS
